name: Philip Schaff
title: Church Historian
bio: Swiss-born American theologian and church historian who produced the monumental 8-volume 'History of the Christian Church,' still one of the most comprehensive church histories ever written. He also edited the 'Nicene and Post-Nicene Fathers' series, making patristic writings accessible to English readers.
faith: Schaff believed that understanding church history was essential to faithful Christianity. His ecumenical spirit — unusual for his time — led him to appreciate the riches of all Christian traditions while remaining firmly evangelical. His editorial work on the church fathers has been an indispensable resource for over a century.
tagline: His 8-volume church history remains indispensable after 130 years
